technical.question: Explain the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases. When would you choose one over the other?
What is Big O notation? Give an example comparing O(n²) and O(n log n) algorithms.
Explain RESTful API design principles. What makes a good REST API?
What is the difference between synchronous and asynchronous programming? When do you use async/await?
How would you design a scalable web application? Walk me through the key architectural decisions.
What is the difference between a process and a thread? How does Node.js handle concurrency?
Explain database indexing. When would you add an index, and what are the trade-offs?
Explain the SOLID principles. Give me a concrete example of one principle you've applied.
What happens end-to-end when you type a URL in the browser and press Enter?
Compare microservices and monolithic architecture. What are the real-world trade-offs?

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time you had to deal with a difficult team member. How did you handle the situation?
Describe a situation where you had to meet a very tight deadline. What was your approach and what was the outcome?
Tell me about a time you failed at a project or task. What did you learn from it?
Describe a time when you had to learn a completely new technology quickly. How did you approach it?
Tell me about a project you are most proud of. What was your specific contribution and impact?
Describe a time when you disagreed with your manager or a senior colleague. How did you handle it?
Tell me about a time you had to manage multiple competing priorities or deadlines. What did you do?
Describe a situation where you had to give difficult feedback to a peer or team member.

hr.question: Where do you see yourself in five years, and how does this role fit into that vision?
What are your two or three greatest professional strengths? Give me examples of how they have helped you.
What is your biggest weakness, and what concrete steps are you taking to improve it?
Why are you looking to leave your current role, and what are you hoping to find in your next position?
How do you handle stress and pressure at work? Give me a specific example.
What motivates you to perform at your best, and how do you stay engaged on long-running projects?
How do you stay current with industry trends and continue growing professionally?
Describe your ideal working environment and the management style you work best under.
